calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Judge: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Mary Hinds. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Steven E. Littman. Also present, plaintiff's agent, Mr. Richard. The parties enter into a stipulation in settlement of the cause per the record. Court orders the matter off calendar and vacates the trial date.
